bc v2 runs wayy smoother than 1.5
1.50 (again, presumably what you mean) is gamemaker 8.1, for 2.0 they ported it to the community made 8.2 engine
So it probably would by default, because 8.2 is made by the same pair who made all that dbg helper stuff

not quite aurafarming, but a little bit of aura agriculture going on

there is even spreadsheet for tracking clears
CosmicSense was the first to beat v1.30

First person to beat final boss I think might have been rollunk? It's not a very meaningful question because a lot of people got to final boss before final boss actually came out, the game was released in parts

for v0.995 is a bit harder question
